title: 弥生賞の後に・燃えたッ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket faces the awesome sprint of
Narita Taishin, but manages to win out by
matching her rival's fearsome determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, though reluctant to admit it, seems to
have gained a new respect for Ticket's
wholehearted efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares that she won't lose in their next
encounter at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket begins training to ensure she wins
their next race as well.
